text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the spring Tenno Sho is here. Have we
found a way to compete against Tamamo Cross's
purpose of racing for her less-than-fortunate
family?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well? Did ya find a reason to race that's better
than mine?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thought so. Not that easy to find your own
reason, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Happy, satisfied folks should just sit quietly and
enjoy their lives.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek, today's crown is mine for the takin'! I'm the
star!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I'll whomp that trainer lurkin' behind ya so
bad they'll never be the same.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Eh?! Wh-what's gotten into ya all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I can't let you do that, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's the one thing you won't ever get away with!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The hell? I've never seen you like this before...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, no point tryin' to threaten me though.
Sheer will's not gonna win you the race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Cause I ain't gonna hold back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a terrifyingly serious look on Super
Creek's face.
